problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: The key to Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? is Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site — specifically Small molecule inhibitor — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
